category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a performance monitoring CLI tool for Apple Silicon; official project page describes CPU, GPU, ANE, memory, and power monitoring.
display_name_sources: Official project page and source_facts.name both use asitop.
docs_sources: Official GitHub Pages site contains installation, usage, and implementation notes.
repo_sources: Official GitHub Pages site links 'View the Project on GitHub tlkh/asitop'; GitHub repository README points back to tlkh.github.io/asitop.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official project page describe Apple Silicon performance monitoring via a command-line tool.
